description: A designed White House announcement card built on a news-style layout. The top is a white band carrying the 'SCRIPPS NEWS' logo (blue/navy) and a bold black serif headline: 'President Trump to celebrate small business owners.' The main image below is a color photograph shot from behind President Trump (in a dark navy suit) as he stands on a stage/platform facing a large crowd of supporters in an arena; the crowd holds blue-and-white campaign-style signs (legible 'LOWER PRICES' placards and red MAGA-style hats) and the stage front is draped in patriotic red-white-blue bunting with white stars. At the bottom right is the small white line-art White House emblem with the engraved 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON' wordmark. The style mimics a shared news article/screenshot to lend third-party credibility. The propaganda technique presents an upbeat governance/event announcement (per the tweet, Trump hosting 130+ small-business leaders) framed through a news outlet headline, targeting a general/business audience to credit the administration with pro-small-business 'wins.'
notable_text: SCRIPPS NEWS | President Trump to celebrate small business owners | THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
